title: Crews rescue 5 after engine fire aboard fishing boat off Murrells Inlet coast
summary: MURRELLS INLET, S.C. (WBTW) -- Five people were safely rescued late Thursday morning after an engine fire aboard a 42-foot fishing boat in the ocean off Murrells Inlet, officials said. It happened at about 11:15 a.m., about 2.5 miles off the coast, according to Murrells Inlet-Garden City Assistant Fire Chief Brennan Moore, who said the [...]

title: Firefighter hurt, home damaged after fire near Surfside Beach
summary: A firefighter was hurt after an early morning fire.

title: Loris-area car crash sets nearby woods on fire, officials say
summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- A Loris-area vehicle crash caused a woods fire late Wednesday night, according to Horry County Fire Rescue. Crews responded just before 9 p.m. to the area of Riverbend Road and Highway 141 where a vehicle involved in a crash caught fire, which set nearby woods on fire. The incident was [...]

title: Firefighter hospitalized after Horry County house fire
summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- A firefighter was hospitalized with minor injuries Thursday morning after a house fire on South Kings Highway at Lakewood Camping Resort, according to Horry County Fire Rescue. Crews responded around 5:15 a.m. to the 5000 block of South Kings Hwy. in the Surfside area where the back of a home [...]

title: Flood Watch Continues as Showers, Storms Bring Cooler Temperatures to the Carolinas
summary: (WSPA) -- Mostly cloudy and not as hot Thursday. Showers and thunderstorms are expected, with the highest concentration over the mountains and the northern Upstate. This will lead to a spread of high temperatures, with mid-to-upper 70s in the mountains and a range from mid-80s in the northern Upstate to lower 90s in the south. [...]

title: Waccamaw Boulevard bar owner gives more detail about weekend shootout
summary: HORRY COUNTY, S.C. (WBTW) -- The owner of a bar along Waccamaw Boulevard in Horry County has provided new details about a shootout over the weekend that left a person wounded. Officers were called to the 3200 block of Waccamaw Boulevard just after 11:30 p.m. Sunday and found evidence of gunfire, police said. The area [...]
